requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Armenian market fall under the EAEU / Customs Union framework. Electrical safety is governed by TR CU 004/2011 (On the safety of low-voltage equipment), which applies to equipment rated 50–1000 V AC. Conformity is demonstrated against GOST IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), the GOST adoption of IEC 60598-1, which covers protection against electric shock, insulation resistance, creepage and clearance distances, thermal protection, mechanical strength, and wiring terminals. A successful assessment results in an EAC certificate or declaration of conformity issued through an accredited EAEU body and the EAC conformity mark on the product. Armenia's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — a genuine match to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal, so no supply-voltage redesign is required.
summary.zh: 在亚美尼亚市场销售的 LED 灯具受 EAEU／关税同盟框架管辖。电气安全由 TR CU 004/2011（低压设备安全技术法规）规范，适用于额定 50–1000 V 交流的设备。合格性依据 GOST IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：通用要求和试验，即 IEC 60598-1 的 GOST 采用版）证明，涵盖防触电、绝缘电阻、爬电距离和电气间隙、热保护、机械强度及接线端子。评定通过后，由 EAEU 认可机构出具 EAC 合格证书或符合性声明，并在产品上加贴 EAC 合格标志。亚美尼亚电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 标称值真正匹配，故无需电源电压改设计。
summary.zht: 在亞美尼亞市場銷售的 LED 燈具受 EAEU／關稅同盟框架管轄。電氣安全由 TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備安全技術法規）規範，適用於額定 50–1000 V 交流的設備。合格性依據 GOST IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：通用要求和試驗，即 IEC 60598-1 的 GOST 採用版）證明，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣電阻、爬電距離和電氣間隙、熱保護、機械強度及接線端子。評定通過後，由 EAEU 認可機構出具 EAC 合格證書或符合性聲明，並在產品上加貼 EAC 合格標誌。亞美尼亞電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 標稱值真正匹配，故無需電源電壓改設計。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on the safety of low-voltage equipment
GOST IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (GOST adoption of IEC 60598-1)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026, with the designation changing from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T. CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules. Both GB 7000.1 and GOST IEC 60598-1 derive from the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the technical content is broadly aligned, but the conformity-assessment process, documentation language, and the EAC marking obligation are separate and non-mutual with CCC.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T。范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定。GB 7000.1 与 GOST IEC 60598-1 均源自同一 IEC 60598-1 基础，技术内容基本一致，但合格评定程序、文件语言及 EAC 加贴义务均独立，与 CCC 不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T。範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定。GB 7000.1 與 GOST IEC 60598-1 均源自同一 IEC 60598-1 基礎，技術內容基本一致，但合格評定程序、文件語言及 EAC 加貼義務均獨立，與 CCC 不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both Armenia (GOST IEC 60598-1) and China (GB 7000.1) build on the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the core safety content is largely aligned and the matching 220/380 V 50 Hz grid removes any supply-voltage redesign. The gap is procedural and documentary: Armenia requires conformity under TR CU 004/2011 with an EAC certificate or declaration issued through an accredited EAEU body, an in-country registered importer, and the EAC mark on the product — none of which a Chinese CCC certificate satisfies. Existing CN test reports cannot be directly reused for the EAC pathway; testing should be against the GOST IEC 60598-1 text by a laboratory accepted within the EAEU accreditation system. Documentation is typically required in Russian.
gap.zh: 亚美尼亚（GOST IEC 60598-1）与中国（GB 7000.1）均以同一 IEC 60598-1 为基础，核心安全内容基本一致，且 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网匹配消除了电源电压改设计需求。差距在于程序与文件：亚美尼亚要求依据 TR CU 004/2011 合规，由 EAEU 认可机构出具 EAC 证书或声明，须有进口国注册进口商，并在产品上加贴 EAC 标志——中国 CCC 证书均不满足这些要求。现有中国检测报告不可直接用于 EAC 路径；应由 EAEU 认可体系内接受的实验室按 GOST IEC 60598-1 文本检测。文件通常须以俄文提供。
gap.zht: 亞美尼亞（GOST IEC 60598-1）與中國（GB 7000.1）均以同一 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，核心安全內容基本一致，且 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網匹配消除了電源電壓改設計需求。差距在於程序與文件：亞美尼亞要求依據 TR CU 004/2011 合規，由 EAEU 認可機構出具 EAC 證書或聲明，須有進口國註冊進口商，並在產品上加貼 EAC 標誌——中國 CCC 證書均不滿足這些要求。現有中國檢測報告不可直接用於 EAC 路徑；應由 EAEU 認可體系內接受的實驗室按 GOST IEC 60598-1 文本檢測。文件通常須以俄文提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011 (low-voltage safety) required before placing the luminaire on the Armenian / EAEU market; EAC mark required
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Armenia require EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011, demonstrated against GOST IEC 60598-1, with a certificate or declaration from an accredited EAEU body and the EAC mark on the product. The technical content is largely harmonized with China's GB 7000.1 via the common IEC 60598-1 base, and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so the burden is primarily procedural — EAC assessment, an in-country importer, and Russian-language documentation. Chinese CCC certification does not satisfy the EAC pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入亚美尼亚的 LED 灯具须依据 TR CU 004/2011 取得 EAC 合格，依据 GOST IEC 60598-1 证明，由 EAEU 认可机构出具证书或声明，并在产品上加贴 EAC 标志。技术内容经由共同的 IEC 60598-1 基础与中国 GB 7000.1 基本协调，220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国匹配，故负担主要为程序性——EAC 评定、进口国进口商及俄文文件。中国 CCC 认证不满足 EAC 路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入亞美尼亞的 LED 燈具須依據 TR CU 004/2011 取得 EAC 合格，依據 GOST IEC 60598-1 證明，由 EAEU 認可機構出具證書或聲明，並在產品上加貼 EAC 標誌。技術內容經由共同的 IEC 60598-1 基礎與中國 GB 7000.1 基本協調，220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國匹配，故負擔主要為程序性——EAC 評定、進口國進口商及俄文文件。中國 CCC 認證不滿足 EAC 路徑。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Control Gear Safety (TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: LED drivers (control gear for LED modules) intended for the Armenian market fall under TR CU 004/2011 (low-voltage safety) where they are within its voltage scope. Conformity is demonstrated against GOST IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), the GOST adoption of IEC 61347-2-13, which specifies isolation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, and safety marking. If the driver is sold as a separate product (not integrated into the luminaire), it requires its own EAC conformity assessment and the EAC mark in addition to luminaire-level compliance.
summary.zh: 面向亚美尼亚市场的 LED 驱动器（LED 模块控制装置）在其电压范围内受 TR CU 004/2011（低压安全）管辖。合格性依据 GOST IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求，即 IEC 61347-2-13 的 GOST 采用版）证明，规定绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性及安全标志。若驱动器作为独立产品销售（未集成于灯具内），则除灯具级合规外，还须进行独立的 EAC 合格评定并加贴 EAC 标志。
summary.zht: 面向亞美尼亞市場的 LED 驅動器（LED 模組控制裝置）在其電壓範圍內受 TR CU 004/2011（低壓安全）管轄。合格性依據 GOST IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求，即 IEC 61347-2-13 的 GOST 採用版）證明，規定絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及安全標誌。若驅動器作為獨立產品銷售（未集成於燈具內），則除燈具級合規外，還須進行獨立的 EAC 合格評定並加貼 EAC 標誌。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on the safety of low-voltage equipment
GOST IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (GOST adoption of IEC 61347-2-13)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), technically aligned with IEC 61347-2-13. CCC certification may be required for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. Chinese CCC test reports under GB 19510.14 are not accepted under the EAEU TR CU 004/2011 conformity-assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求），技术上与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐。在中国居民市场，特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。中国 GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 检测报告不被 EAEU TR CU 004/2011 合格评定路径所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求），技術上與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊。在中國居民市場，特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。中國 GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 檢測報告不被 EAEU TR CU 004/2011 合格評定路徑所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: GOST IEC 61347-2-13 and GB 19510.14 both derive from IEC 61347-2-13, so the driver safety content is largely harmonized and the matching 220 V 50 Hz input rating removes supply-side redesign. Key EAC-specific gaps: (1) a standalone driver sold separately from the luminaire needs its own EAC conformity assessment and EAC mark under TR CU 004/2011; (2) testing should be against the GOST IEC 61347-2-13 text by a laboratory accepted within the EAEU accreditation system, since CN CCC reports are not transferable; (3) an in-country registered importer and Russian-language documentation are required. Where the driver is integrated and not sold separately, its evidence forms part of the luminaire EAC technical file.
gap.zh: GOST IEC 61347-2-13 与 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，驱动器安全内容基本协调，220 V 50 Hz 输入额定值匹配消除了供电侧改设计。主要 EAC 特有差距：（1）与灯具分开销售的独立驱动器须依据 TR CU 004/2011 进行独立 EAC 合格评定并加贴 EAC 标志；（2）应由 EAEU 认可体系内接受的实验室按 GOST IEC 61347-2-13 文本检测，因为中国 CCC 报告不可转用；（3）须有进口国注册进口商及俄文文件。若驱动器集成且非独立销售，其证据属于灯具 EAC 技术文件的一部分。
gap.zht: GOST IEC 61347-2-13 與 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，驅動器安全內容基本協調，220 V 50 Hz 輸入額定值匹配消除了供電側改設計。主要 EAC 特有差距：（1）與燈具分開銷售的獨立驅動器須依據 TR CU 004/2011 進行獨立 EAC 合格評定並加貼 EAC 標誌；（2）應由 EAEU 認可體系內接受的實驗室按 GOST IEC 61347-2-13 文本檢測，因為中國 CCC 報告不可轉用；（3）須有進口國註冊進口商及俄文文件。若驅動器集成且非獨立銷售，其證據屬於燈具 EAC 技術文件的一部分。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011 required for drivers sold as standalone products on the Armenian / EAEU market; assessed against GOST IEC 61347-2-13
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for LED drivers in certain ranges under CNCA-C10-01; GB 19510.14-2014 is the applicable safety standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED drivers placed on the Armenian market as standalone products require EAC conformity under TR CU 004/2011, assessed against GOST IEC 61347-2-13. The technical content is largely harmonized with China's GB 19510.14 via the common IEC 61347-2-13 base, and the 220 V 50 Hz rating matches China. Chinese CCC certification does not satisfy the EAC pathway. When the driver is integrated into a luminaire and not sold separately, its safety evidence forms part of the luminaire EAC technical file alongside the GOST IEC 60598-1 evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 作为独立产品在亚美尼亚市场销售的 LED 驱动器须依据 TR CU 004/2011 取得 EAC 合格，依据 GOST IEC 61347-2-13 评定。技术内容经由共同的 IEC 61347-2-13 基础与中国 GB 19510.14 基本协调，220 V 50 Hz 额定值与中国匹配。中国 CCC 认证不满足 EAC 路径。当驱动器集成于灯具内且非独立销售时，其安全证据与 GOST IEC 60598-1 证据一并构成灯具 EAC 技术文件的一部分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 作為獨立產品在亞美尼亞市場銷售的 LED 驅動器須依據 TR CU 004/2011 取得 EAC 合格，依據 GOST IEC 61347-2-13 評定。技術內容經由共同的 IEC 61347-2-13 基礎與中國 GB 19510.14 基本協調，220 V 50 Hz 額定值與中國匹配。中國 CCC 認證不滿足 EAC 路徑。當驅動器集成於燈具內且非獨立銷售時，其安全證據與 GOST IEC 60598-1 證據一併構成燈具 EAC 技術文件的一部分。
